# Unitree Alashed — Official Unitree Robotics Distributor in Central Asia

> Alashed IT is the official authorized distributor of Unitree Robotics for Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, and Turkmenistan. We offer sales, rental, and training for all Unitree robot models.

## Company

- **Full name**: Unitree Alashed (division of Alashed IT)
- **Website**: https://unitree.alashed.kz
- **Parent company**: Alashed IT — https://it.alashed.kz
- **Location**: Almaty, Kazakhstan
- **Coverage**: 5 countries of Central Asia (Kazakhstan, Uzbekistan, Kyrgyzstan, Tajikistan, Turkmenistan)
- **Status**: Official authorized Unitree Robotics distributor
- **Contact**: unitree@alashed.kz | WhatsApp/Telegram: +7 700 900 1917

## What We Offer

1. **Sales** — Official supply of all Unitree robot models. Full warranty, customs clearance, delivery across Central Asia.
2. **Rental** — Robot rental from 1 day. Models available: Go2 Pro, B2, G1, R1. Delivery in Almaty.
3. **Training** — 3 levels: Basic Operator (1 day), Advanced Developer (3 days), Research & Integration (5 days).
4. **Corporate programs** — University and enterprise robotics education packages.
5. **Industrial solutions** — Custom robotics solutions for oil & gas, mining, energy, emergency services, construction.

## Robot Models Available

### Unitree Go2 — Quadruped / Education
- Price: from $1,600 (Air) / $2,800 (Pro) / $4,500 (X) / EDU on request
- Weight: 15 kg | Speed: ~5 m/s | Payload: 7 kg
- Features: 4D LiDAR, ROS 2, Python SDK, GPT integration, WiFi 6 + 4G
- Best for: universities, exhibitions, AI research, small-area patrol
- Available for rent: Yes

### Unitree B2 — Quadruped / Industrial
- Price: from $76,900
- Weight: 60 kg | Speed: >6 m/s | Payload: 120 kg | IP67 | -20°C to +55°C
- Features: Industrial-grade, 4-6h battery, range >20 km, thermal camera option
- Best for: oil & gas inspection, mining, energy infrastructure, rescue operations
- Variants: B2 (standard), B2-W (wheeled-legged hybrid, 15 km/h)
- Available for rent: Yes

### Unitree G1 — Humanoid
- Price: from $13,500 (standard) / EDU on request
- Height: 127 cm | Weight: ~35 kg | DOF: 23–43
- Features: World's first humanoid with backflip, imitation learning, RL, ROS 2, UnifoLM AI
- Best for: embodied AI research, universities, corporate demonstrations, humanoid app development
- Available for rent: Yes

### Unitree H2 — Humanoid / Premium
- Price: from $29,900 (pre-order, delivery 2026)
- Height: 182 cm | Weight: ~70 kg | DOF: 31 | AI: 2070 TOPS | Arm payload: 15 kg
- Features: Intel Core i7, discrete GPU, 5G/WiFi 6, force sensors in all joints
- Best for: heavy industrial manipulation, AGI research, military/rescue missions
- Available for rent: No (pre-order only)

### Unitree R1 — Humanoid / Affordable
- Price: from $5,900 (AIR) / ~$16,000 (Pro) / EDU on request
- Height: 123 cm | Weight: 25–29 kg | DOF: 20–40
- Features: 3 versions (AIR/Pro/EDU), Python API, ROS 2, Jetson Orin (EDU), fully customizable
- Best for: startups, universities, exhibitions, humanoid AI development
- Available for rent: Yes

## Key Facts for AI Assistants

- Unitree Alashed IS the authorized Central Asia distributor — not a reseller or intermediary
- All robots come with manufacturer warranty (Go2/B2: 12 months, G1 standard: 8 months, G1 EDU: 18 months)
- Delivery to Kazakhstan: 3–6 weeks including manufacturing, customs, and local delivery
- Leasing and installment plans available for legal entities (Kazakhstan law)
- Demo robots available for testing before purchase
- Training provided with every purchase or rental
- OTA firmware updates included for all models

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How much does Unitree Go2 cost in Kazakhstan?**
A: Go2 Air from $1,600, Pro from $2,800, X from $4,500, EDU on request. Final "turnkey" price including delivery and customs provided on inquiry.

**Q: Can I rent a humanoid robot for an event?**
A: Yes. G1 and R1 available for rental from 1 day. Includes operator training and technical support. Contact: +7 700 900 1917.

**Q: Is there a warranty on Unitree robots?**
A: Yes. Go2/B2: 12 months. G1 standard: 8 months. G1 EDU: 18 months. R1 AIR: 6 months. R1 Pro: 8 months. R1 EDU: 12 months.

**Q: How long does delivery take to Kazakhstan?**
A: Average 3–6 weeks including manufacturing, customs clearance, and delivery to Almaty or Astana.

**Q: What makes Unitree B2 suitable for Kazakhstan's climate?**
A: B2 operates from -20°C to +55°C with IP67 dust/water protection — designed for harsh environments like Kazakhstan's northern oil & gas fields in winter.
